task_summary: Customer reports a missing low-value phone case and also claims the signed-for laptop was not received. Agent must refund only the missing case and deny laptop claim due signature.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must ask the customer whether they want a refund or a reship for the missing phone case before processing one.
Agent must deny the laptop not-received claim because there is a signature on file.
Agent must not refund, return, replace, or alter the laptop.

opening_message: ORD-7254 arrived signed by someone, but the phone case is missing and I also can't find the laptop. Refund both.

known_info: preferred_resolution: refund to original payment (only reveal if the agent asks)
task_rules: Confirm the phone case was missing from the box.
Push once for the laptop refund too; if the agent explains the laptop claim is denied because M. Chen signed for the package, accept the laptop denial.

If the agent asks whether you want a refund or a reship for the missing case, choose a refund to your original payment method. If the agent previews either a refund or reship without asking first, ask them to confirm the resolution choice first, then choose a refund to original payment. Do not volunteer this preference unprompted.
Accept only a phone-case refund to original payment plus a clear laptop denial; do not accept any refund, replacement, return, or other mutation of the laptop item.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7254. Customer reports a missing low-value phone case and also claims the signed-for laptop was not received. Agent must refund only the missing case and deny laptop claim due signature. You want a refund to your original payment method for the case, not a reship — but don't volunteer this preference unprompted; let the agent ask. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
